summary: WebP Image Optimization testing complete. All 390 PNG/JPG files successfully converted to WebP on CDN (93% size reduction). Backend returns .webp URLs from DB, CDN serves with 30-day cache + Cloudflare edge caching. Frontend SafeImage component auto-upgrades CDN URLs to .webp with fallback. lazy loading enabled on 96% of images.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing WebP converted files
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebP optimization complete. 390 PNG/JPG → WebP conversion done (93% size reduction, 527MB saved). 926 DB documents updated with .webp URLs. Products page has 217 products all with WebP images.
